schema.ion.id › core › support › v1

core/support/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/support/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONSupportTicket

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/support/v1#IONSupportTicket

PropertyMandatoryDescription
idalwaysNetwork-wide unique issue identifier. Assigned at creation.
categoryalwaysITEM: wrong item, damaged, not as described. FULFILLMENT: delivery delay, non-delivery, wrong address. PAYMENT: overchar
subCategoryoptionalSub-category code for more precise classification. e.g. ITM01=wrong item, ITM02=damaged, FLM01=delay, FLM02=non-delivery
complainantInfooptional
descriptionoptional
sourceoptional
expectedResponseTimeoptionalISO 8601 duration. Time within which respondent must acknowledge.
expectedResolutionTimeoptionalISO 8601 duration. Time within which resolution must be provided.
statusalways
severityoptional
issueActionsoptionalAction trail — both sides of the conversation.
resolutionoptional
ratingoptionalConsumer rating of resolution quality after issue is CLOSED
createdAtalways
updatedAtalways
escalationLeveloptionalCurrent escalation level of the dispute. Progression: 1. SELLER — buyer contacts seller (default support flow, 1-2 days)
escalationTimestampconditionalWhen the ticket was escalated to this level
escalationSlaHoursoptionalSLA in hours for the current escalation level
bpskReferenceconditionalBPSK case reference number
kominfoReferenceconditionalKominfo consumer complaint portal reference

Pack README

ion-core/support/v1

Consumer complaint ticket — buyer raises order issues to seller. APIs: support/on_support.

Attaches to

`beckn:Support`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/support/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
